## Checklist
- [ ] Builds locally (`npm run build`) and lints clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (labels, alt text, colour contrast, keyboard) — WCAG 2.1 AA
- [ ] Responsive at 320 / 768 / 1024 / 1440
- [ ] No secrets or keys committed
- [ ] Uses the Tailwind design tokens (no hard-coded colours)
